title: 🚀 Kyoto API v1.0 Released
message: 30+ endpoints now available! AI, Downloader, Tools, Storage, Media & Manga categories.

title: 📢 New: Manga Category
message: 5 new manga/anime endpoints added including search, chapters, anime info, and waifu images.

title: ⚡ Performance Update
message: Average response time improved to <80ms across all endpoints. Rate limit increased to 100 req/min.

title: 🔒 Security Patch
message: Updated CORS headers to support all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, OPTIONS).

title: 📦 New: Storage API
message: File upload, list, and delete endpoints now available with 50MB max file size.

title: 🎨 Media Tools Added
message: Canvas generator, sticker maker, remove background, and meme generator endpoints live.
